title: Re-observation (supervisor source): runner emits re_observation_request, supervisor responds with re_observation_resolved, runner injects content and emits re_observation_injected
description: Full lifecycle for a supervisor-source re-observation. The runner pauses awaiting supervisor content. The supervisor's re_observation_resolved is recorded into the trajectory verbatim with source='supervisor'. The runner then injects and emits re_observation_injected with source_kind='supervisor'.

send.content: Ticket AUTH-1234 is in QA. Test coverage: 87%.

match.content: Ticket AUTH-1234 is in QA. Test coverage: 87%.

forbidden_events.label: re_observation_resolved MUST NOT be tagged source=runner
no timeout when supervisor responded in time
